_note: The per-set sets/<set>/manifest.json model is GONE. The pipeline is now THREE files side-by-side in godot/assets/tiles/v2/: pipeline.json (spec + state), pipeline.history.json (the candidate/attempt-log sidecar, keyed itemId -> keyframeId -> candidate[]), and pipeline.schema.json (the formal JSON Schema both data files are validated against). There is no blank per-set manifest to copy. To author a new family, append an items[] entry to pipeline.json.
_keyframeShape: A NEW keyframe (master or child) in pipeline.json carries ONLY: { id, prompt, selected: null, selectedPath: null }. NO candidates field — candidate records live in pipeline.history.json, which starts as {} and fills in as seeds generate. See assets/manifest.history.template.json.
_see: references/manifest-schema.md (the three-file shape + every field) and references/intake.md (how intake writes the items[] entry).
